item.title: Version 2.4.2
item.description:
[2.4.2] - 2026-03-16

Added

  • Gate Counterrotation: Gate labels and text now counterrotate to stay readable when gates are rotated
  • Right-click Rotate Setting: New preference to disable right-click rotation for gates

Fixed

  • Rotating gates with wires attached while pasting no longer allowed, preventing broken wire connections
  • Fixed crash when zooming on Windows

Full Changelog: https://github.com/taciturnaxolotl/CedarLogic/compare/v2.4.1...v2.4.2

item.title: Version 2.4.2
item.description:
[2.4.2] - 2026-03-16

Added

  • Gate Counterrotation: Gate labels and text now counterrotate to stay readable when gates are rotated
  • Right-click Rotate Setting: New preference to disable right-click rotation for gates

Fixed

  • Rotating gates with wires attached while pasting no longer allowed, preventing broken wire connections
  • Fixed crash when zooming on Windows

Full Changelog: https://github.com/taciturnaxolotl/CedarLogic/compare/v2.4.1...v2.4.2
